content.intro: References progress through several statuses as they move through the verification process. Understanding these statuses helps you track where each reference is and what actions may be needed.

steps.title: Sent
steps.content: The reference form has been sent to the tenant via email. They haven't started filling it in yet. You can see how long ago the email was sent.

steps.title: In Progress
steps.content: The tenant has opened the form and started completing it. They may still be entering their details or uploading documents.

steps.title: Collecting Evidence
steps.content: The tenant has submitted their questionnaire. The system is now collecting supporting evidence - this includes employer references, landlord references, and any additional documents.

steps.title: Awaiting Verification
steps.content: All information has been collected and the reference is in the verification queue. Our verification team will review the submitted information and evidence.

steps.title: Action Required
steps.content: The verification team has flagged something that needs your attention. Check the reference details to see what action is needed.

steps.title: Completed
steps.content: The reference has been fully verified and is complete. You can now convert it to a tenancy.

steps.title: Rejected
steps.content: The reference has failed verification. Check the reference details for the reason.

sections.title: Status Tab Counts
sections.content: The tabs at the top of the References page show the count for each status. Click a tab to filter the list to only show references in that status.

sections.title: Chasing Pending Responses
sections.content: If a reference is stuck in 'Sent' or 'In Progress' for a while, you may need to chase the tenant. The system can send automated reminders, but you can also manually resend the reference invitation.
